info.title: Manifestly Checklists API
info.description: Manifestly Checklists software improves collaboration and accountability in your organization's recurring processes. This API allows you to manage workflows, runs, steps, and users.

parameters.name: external_id
parameters.description: External ID of the workflow to deactivate

get.summary: List all steps for a workflow

put.summary: Create or update step data setting

get.summary: List content objects for a step
List all steps for a run

post.summary: Add data to a run step

get.summary: List comments for a run step

post.summary: Add a comment to a run step
Assign a run step to a user
Add a user to a department

apiKeyHeader.name: Authorization
apiKeyHeader.description: API key passed in the Authorization header

tags.name: Step Data Settings
tags.description: Manage data settings for workflow steps

tags.name: Content Objects
tags.description: Manage content objects for workflow steps
